channel.title: Spectroscopy on Yuming Fu's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Spectroscopy on Yuming Fu's Homepage

item.title: AIMS-z: astrophysics-informed machine learning for spectroscopic redshifts of quasars
item.description: AIMS-z is a multimodal, astrophysics-informed machine-learning framework for reliable spectroscopic redshift determination of quasars, with an initial focus on Euclid slitless spectra.

item.title: Euclid Q1 spectroscopy of bright quasars
item.description: Our paper “Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1). XXXVIII. Euclid spectroscopy of quasars. 1. Identification and redshift determination of 3500 bright quasars” has been accepted by Astronomy & Astrophysics.
